summary: Added focused parsed-fixture tests for Hyprland monitor and workspace accessors that survived the workspace mutation baseline, then verified the targeted model mutation surface has no missed mutants.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Evidence records the relevant workspace mutation baseline cluster for Hyprland model accessors.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-hyprland-model-accessor-mutation-hardening/notes.md records the supplied model.rs survivor cluster for monitor description, scale, dpms_status, disabled, and workspace monitor_id, has_fullscreen, and is_persistent.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Focused tests cover monitor description, scale, dpms_status, disabled, workspace monitor_id, has_fullscreen, and is_persistent behavior through parsed fixtures.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: crates/hyprland/src/model.rs adds parsed inline fixture tests with distinct monitor descriptions, non-default scales, opposite monitor booleans, distinct monitor IDs, and opposite workspace booleans.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Run a targeted mutation check for crates/hyprland/src/model.rs if feasible, or document residual surviving model mutants with rationale.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Final targeted run: cargo mutants -p madobe-hyprland --file crates/hyprland/src/model.rs --timeout 120 --jobs 2 --all-features. Result: 70 mutants tested in 31s: 58 caught, 12 unviable; no missed mutants and no timeouts.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: nix develop -c cargo test -p madobe-hyprland --all-features passes.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: Final run passed: 7 unit tests, 1 adapter binding test, 3 adapter lifecycle tests, 5 fixture tests, and doc tests all passed.
Final run passed after test lint fixes.

commandsRun.command: nix develop -c cargo mutants -p madobe-hyprland --file crates/hyprland/src/model.rs --timeout 120 --jobs 2 --all-features --output /tmp/madobe-hyprland-model-mutants-final

realWorldValidation.evidence: This node hardens parsed model accessor unit and mutation coverage only.
